summary: Iteration 54 - Customer Favorites Feature Testing COMPLETE. All issues from iteration 53 have been fixed. The Save Favorite Dialog now opens correctly from the cart page. Backend APIs (100% pass). Frontend favorites flow (100% pass): Save favorite, view favorites list, add favorite to cart, delete favorite - all working.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: saveToFavorites() was using item.id but cart items have product_id - changed to item.product_id || item.id
FIXED: renderGlobalDialogs() was not called in menu step - added it to ensure dialogs work in all steps
Minor: DialogContent components missing aria-describedby attribute (accessibility)
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/CustomerMenu.js - Fixed product_id mapping in saveToFavorites(), Added renderGlobalDialogs() to menu step
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test favorites via UI for phone 01099887766
context_for_next_testing_agent: All favorites features are now working correctly. The main fixes were: 1) Changed item.id to item.product_id in saveToFavorites(), 2) Added renderGlobalDialogs() call to the menu step return block. All CRUD operations for favorites work: save, list, add to cart, delete.

favorites_ui.header_button: Heart icon visible in menu header - WORKING
favorites_ui.cart_save_button: 'حفظ كمفضل' button visible in cart - WORKING
favorites_ui.add_to_cart: Adds favorite items to cart - WORKING

fixes_applied.issue: saveToFavorites() was using item.id but cart items have product_id
renderGlobalDialogs() was not called in menu step, so dialogs didn't open
